name: Suspicious Microsoft Equation Editor Child Process
description: A suspicious child process was spawned by EQNEDT32.exe, which is a strong indicator of successful exploitation of CVE-2017-11882, leading to remote code execution.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of when the suspicious child process was created.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the child process executable that was spawned.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process (EQNEDT32.exe).

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line arguments of the child process.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the suspicious process ran.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the event occurred.

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the alert, if available.
